message:
fix(distributed): make close idempotent and reconcile replica loss across all degraded states

RegionBridge.begin_close and complete_close now skip the distributed
transition when the distributed region is already Closing/Closed,
preventing double-close panics in concurrent shutdown paths.

DistributedRegionRecord consolidates the quorum-loss handling into a
single reconcile_replica_change method that covers Active, Degraded,
and Recovering states:

- Active regions losing quorum degrade or close depending on config
  (existing behavior), but now also close immediately when all replicas
  are lost even if allow_degraded is true
- Degraded and Recovering regions now transition to Closing when the
  last healthy replica becomes unavailable, instead of silently
  remaining in a state with zero available replicas
- Closing/Closed regions reject replica mutations (add, update, remove,
  lost) with InvalidStateTransition, preventing stale heartbeat
  processing from re-opening state machines that are winding down

RecoveryCollector and StateDecoder now use total_source_symbols() for
multi-block objects instead of per-block symbols_per_block, fixing
premature decode attempts on large objects split across multiple source
blocks. Tests added for all new behaviors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
